Subject: Internal Deal Memo - Project Codename: Operation Horizon

Date: 15 October 2023

To: Board of Directors  
From: Ms. Tan Wei Ming, Lead Counsel  
CC: Dr. Ramasamy Muthu, Financial Analyst  
CC: Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, Head of M&A  

We are pleased to present the preliminary terms for the acquisition of Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd. under Project Horizon. The Sale and Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") outlines a proposed purchase price of SGD 50,000,000. All parties are advised to review the SPA thoroughly.

Ms. Tan Wei Ming and Dr. Ramasamy Muthu will oversee the due diligence process. They can be reached at +65 6123 4567 or wei.ming@lawfirm.sg for any clarifications. For administrative matters, contact Siti Aishah at +65 6789 0123.

Please note, the project status is not finalized, and the project plan will be revisited to ensure robustness. This memo does not constitute an official announcement.

For access to detailed documents, visit our secure portal at https://secureportal.sg/user/S6789012Z. Kindly ensure that all communications reference UEN T12LL3456A for compliance purposes. Do not circulate this memo outside the authorized team.

Best regards,  
Ms. Tan Wei Ming  
wei.ming@lawfirm.sg
